theme_clusters: Termination in China is route-constrained, not discretionary at-will management.
Evidence consistency across legal, HR, and payroll records determines dispute defensibility.
Final settlement and payroll tax handling are legal-risk points, not back-office afterthoughts.
Cross-border governance speed can increase risk if local uncertainty is not escalated early.
dedup_actions: Removed repeated matrix language from prior run and shifted to myth-vs-fact briefing cards.
Merged overlapping legal explanations into one plain-language context block.
fit_reassessment: Source mix remained strong; no weaker tertiary blogs used. Practitioner sources retained for execution guidance while legal anchors stayed official.
uncertainties: Remedy patterns and evidentiary thresholds can vary by city and tribunal practice.
English translations of legal rules may omit nuance present in Chinese authoritative text.
tooling_note: Brave web_search unavailable (missing API key). This run revalidated source relevance using existing trusted corpus and freshness checks in prior repository references.
